hook: I spent $32 and my bathroom cabinet looks like a spa.

aida_breakdown.attention: Creator opens under-sink cabinet and a bottle nearly falls out — catches it, looks at camera deadpan with '$32 FIXED THIS' overlaid.
aida_breakdown.interest: Slow pan of chaos inside: leaking products, fallen bottles, sticky residue, totally wasted vertical space. Creator says she avoided opening it.
aida_breakdown.desire: Timelapse install of stackable pull-out organizers — reveal shows every product tiered, labeled, and instantly visible.
aida_breakdown.action: Creator pulls out a drawer smoothly, smiles at camera, taps bio link on phone.

value_equation.dream_outcome: Under-sink cabinet looks like a boutique hotel bathroom — tiered, labeled, nothing hiding or wasted.
value_equation.perceived_likelihood: $32 price shown on screen, install visible in real time with zero professional help.
value_equation.time_delay: One afternoon — fully organized before dinner.
value_equation.effort_sacrifice: No drilling, no tools, no contractor — just stacks and slides into place.

scenes.visual_prompt: Creator opens under-sink bathroom cabinet. A cleaning bottle immediately tips forward and nearly falls. She catches it and looks at the camera deadpan. Bold '$32 FIXED THIS CABINET' overlaid in white.
scenes.voiceover: Every time I opened this I braced for impact.

scenes.visual_prompt: Slow deliberate pan inside the cluttered under-sink cabinet: fallen bottles, sticky leak rings, crushed boxes, completely wasted vertical space on sides and top. Dim unflattering light.
scenes.voiceover: I could never find anything. Half my products went to waste.

scenes.visual_prompt: Creator holds up the stackable organizer box still in plastic wrap, raises a skeptical eyebrow at the camera. Price sticker visible: $32.
scenes.voiceover: I was skeptical it would actually fit in there. It did.

scenes.visual_prompt: Fast-motion overhead shot of hands sliding pull-out drawers into the organizer frame, stacking two tiers, then placing upright labeled products into each drawer. Satisfying and clean.
scenes.voiceover: No tools. No drilling. Just slides right into place.

scenes.visual_prompt: Reveal of the fully organized under-sink cabinet: two tiered pull-out drawers, every bottle upright and visible, labels facing forward, zero wasted space. Creator slowly pulls one drawer out to show smooth action.
scenes.voiceover: Now it looks like a boutique hotel bathroom. Thirty-two dollars.

scenes.visual_prompt: Creator faces camera with a relaxed smile, taps phone showing Instagram bio. Clean bright bathroom visible in background.
scenes.voiceover: Everything is linked in my bio.

caption:
I spent $32 and my chaotic under-sink cabinet looks like a spa.

I was literally bracing every time I opened it. Bottles falling, products sticky and crushed, no idea what I even had under there.

Got the stackable pull-out organizers from Amazon — no tools, no drilling, done in one afternoon. Every single product is visible now and I actually use what I own.

This is the kind of upgrade that sounds small until you're standing there wondering why you waited.

Link in bio — first product listed.

affiliate_strategy.primary_product: Stackable Under-Sink Cabinet Organizer with Pull-Out Drawers
